findings.title: IAM user "alice" has no MFA device
findings.description: IAM user alice does not have any MFA device configured. This allows password-only authentication which is vulnerable to credential theft.

findings.title: IAM user "alice" has both console access and access keys
findings.description: IAM user alice has both AWS Management Console access and programmatic access keys. This increases the attack surface. Consider separating human and programmatic access.

findings.title: Root account has active access keys
findings.description: The AWS root account has active access keys. Root access keys provide unrestricted access to all resources. Delete them and use IAM users or roles instead.

controlMappings.controlName: Access Control to Personal Data Systems

findings.title: Root account does not have MFA enabled
findings.description: The AWS root account does not have MFA enabled. Enable MFA on the root account to add a critical layer of security.

controlMappings.controlName: Access Control to Personal Data Systems

findings.title: IAM password policy does not enforce full complexity
findings.description: The IAM password policy does not require all character types (uppercase, lowercase, numbers, symbols). Strengthen the policy to meet compliance requirements.

controlMappings.controlName: Access Control to Personal Data Systems

findings.title: IAM password policy minimum length is below 14 characters
findings.description: The IAM password policy minimum length is 6. Best practice recommends at least 14 characters.

controlMappings.controlName: Access Control to Personal Data Systems

findings.title: IAM password policy does not enforce rotation within 90 days
findings.description: Password max age is not set days. Require rotation every 90 days or fewer.

controlMappings.controlName: Access Control to Personal Data Systems

findings.title: IAM policy "WildcardAdmin" grants full wildcard access
findings.description: Customer-managed IAM policy WildcardAdmin (arn:aws:iam::123456789012:policy/WildcardAdmin) contains a statement with "Action": "*" and "Resource": "*". This grants unrestricted access and should be scoped down.

controlMappings.controlName: Access Control to Personal Data Systems

findings.title: S3 bucket "acme-public-uploads" has no public access block configuration
findings.description: S3 bucket acme-public-uploads has no public access block configuration. Enable all four public access block flags to prevent accidental public exposure.

controlMappings.controlName: Access Control to Personal Data Systems

findings.title: S3 bucket "acme-public-uploads" has no server-side encryption
findings.description: S3 bucket acme-public-uploads does not have server-side encryption configured. Enable SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS to protect data at rest.

findings.title: S3 bucket "acme-public-uploads" does not have versioning enabled
findings.description: S3 bucket acme-public-uploads versioning status is "unset". Enable versioning to protect against accidental deletions and overwrites.

findings.title: S3 bucket "acme-public-uploads" does not have access logging enabled
findings.description: S3 bucket acme-public-uploads does not have server access logging enabled. Enable logging to track access patterns and detect unauthorized access.

findings.title: S3 bucket "acme-backups" has no server-side encryption
findings.description: S3 bucket acme-backups does not have server-side encryption configured. Enable SSE-S3 or SSE-KMS to protect data at rest.

findings.title: S3 bucket "acme-backups" does not have versioning enabled
findings.description: S3 bucket acme-backups versioning status is "unset". Enable versioning to protect against accidental deletions and overwrites.

findings.title: S3 bucket "acme-backups" does not have access logging enabled
findings.description: S3 bucket acme-backups does not have server access logging enabled. Enable logging to track access patterns and detect unauthorized access.

findings.title: S3 bucket "acme-logs" does not have versioning enabled

findings.title: S3 bucket "acme-logs" does not have access logging enabled
findings.description: S3 bucket acme-logs does not have server access logging enabled. Enable logging to track access patterns and detect unauthorized access.

findings.title: S3 bucket "acme-static-assets" has no public access block configuration
findings.description: S3 bucket acme-static-assets has no public access block configuration. Enable all four public access block flags to prevent accidental public exposure.

findings.title: Security group "prod-web" has unrestricted outbound traffic
findings.description: Security group sg-001 in VPC vpc-abc123 allows all outbound traffic to 0.0.0.0/0. Consider restricting egress rules to limit data exfiltration risk.

findings.title: Security group "bastion" allows SSH (port 22) from 0.0.0.0/0
findings.description: Security group sg-002 in VPC vpc-abc123 allows inbound SSH access from the entire internet. Restrict SSH access to known IP ranges or use a bastion host.

findings.title: EBS volume "vol-001" is not encrypted
findings.description: EBS volume vol-001 (100GB, gp3) in us-east-1a is not encrypted. Enable encryption to protect data at rest.

findings.title: EBS volume "vol-003" is not encrypted
findings.description: EBS volume vol-003 (50GB, gp2) in us-east-1a is not encrypted. Enable encryption to protect data at rest.

findings.title: No CloudTrail trails configured
findings.description: No CloudTrail trails are configured in this account. CloudTrail provides audit logging of all AWS API calls and is critical for security monitoring and compliance.

findings.title: KMS key "key-001aaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee" does not have automatic rotation enabled
findings.description: Customer-managed KMS key arn:aws:kms:us-east-1:123456789012:key/key-001aaa-bbbb-cccc-dddd-eeeeeeeeeeee does not have automatic key rotation enabled. Enable rotation to limit the amount of data encrypted under a single key version.
